name: claude-m-microsoft-marketplace
description: Focused Claude marketplace for Microsoft workflow plugins maintained in this repository.

plugins.name: microsoft-teams-mcp
plugins.description: Send messages, create meetings, and manage Teams channels via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-excel-mcp
plugins.description: Read and update workbooks, worksheets, ranges, and tables via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-outlook-mcp
plugins.description: Send email and manage inbox/calendar tasks via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-azure-mcp
plugins.description: Inspect subscriptions, resource groups, and resources via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-sharepoint-mcp
plugins.description: Browse and transfer SharePoint files through MCP tools.

plugins.name: excel-office-scripts
plugins.description: Deep knowledge of Excel Office Scripts — Microsoft's TypeScript-based automation platform for Excel on the web

plugins.name: m365-platform-clients
plugins.description: TypeScript patterns for Dataverse Web API and Microsoft Graph — auth, clients, and combined provisioning workflows

plugins.name: excel-automation
plugins.description: Excel data cleaning with pandas, Office Script generation, and Power Automate flow creation

plugins.name: m365-admin
plugins.description: M365 tenant admin via Microsoft Graph — users, groups, licenses, Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, Intune, PIM, access reviews, usage reports, guest management, administrative units, Microsoft Search, and domain/federation management

plugins.name: dataverse-schema
plugins.description: Dataverse table, column, and relationship management via Web API — schema design, data seeding, and solution lifecycle

plugins.name: powerbi-fabric
plugins.description: DAX measures, Power Query M, Power BI Embedded, deployment pipelines, PBIP scaffolding, Fabric Lakehouse, Direct Lake, performance optimization

plugins.name: powerbi-paginated-reports
plugins.description: Power BI paginated reports through Fabric — RDL authoring, VB.NET expressions, data source configuration, rendering/export, REST API automation, SSRS-to-Fabric migration, performance tuning, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: powerplatform-alm
plugins.description: Power Platform ALM — environments, solution transport, CI/CD pipelines, PCF controls, and deployment automation

plugins.name: onedrive
plugins.description: OneDrive file management via Microsoft Graph — upload, download, share, search, and manage files and folders

plugins.name: planner-todo
plugins.description: Microsoft Planner and To Do task management via Graph API — classic plans, Premium Dataverse projects, buckets, tasks, assignments, checklists, nested plans, roster plans, sprints, goals, and Business Scenarios

plugins.name: azure-devops
plugins.description: Comprehensive Azure DevOps expertise — Git repos with passwordless auth (GCM, WIF, SSH), YAML and Classic pipelines, deployment environments, agent pools, work items, boards, sprints, test plans, security namespaces, dashboards, wikis, service hooks, Analytics OData, CLI, and extensions

plugins.name: azure-devops-orchestrator
plugins.description: Intelligent orchestration for Azure DevOps — ship work items with Claude Code, triage backlogs, plan sprints, coordinate releases, monitor pipelines, and balance workloads across projects. Integrates with microsoft-teams-mcp and microsoft-outlook-mcp when installed.

plugins.name: entra-id-admin
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra ID administration via Graph API — full user/group lifecycle, directory roles, PIM, authentication methods, admin units, B2B guest management, license assignment, named locations, and entitlement management

plugins.name: entra-id-security
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra ID identity governance and security — app registrations, service principals, conditional access, sign-in logs, and risk detection

plugins.name: powerapps
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Apps development — canvas app creation, model-driven app scaffolding, deployment, formulas, custom connectors, component libraries, and PCF controls

plugins.name: azure-cost-governance
plugins.description: Azure FinOps and governance workflows — query costs, monitor budgets, detect anomalies, and identify idle resources for optimization

plugins.name: power-automate
plugins.description: Design and troubleshoot Power Automate cloud flows — trigger/action patterns, run diagnostics, retries, and deployment-safe flow definitions

plugins.name: purview-compliance
plugins.description: Microsoft Purview compliance workflows — DLP review, retention planning, sensitivity labels, eDiscovery readiness, and guided compliance playbooks with audit-ready change logs

plugins.name: azure-policy-security
plugins.description: Evaluate Azure policy compliance and security posture — policy assignments, drift analysis, remediation planning, and guardrail recommendations

plugins.name: lighthouse-health
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 Lighthouse tenant health scorecard — green/yellow/red dashboard for security posture, MFA coverage, stale accounts, and licensing anomalies across managed tenants

plugins.name: license-optimizer
plugins.description: M365 license optimization for MSPs/CSPs — identify inactive licenses, map downgrades and upgrades, estimate savings, and generate multi-tenant Lighthouse reports for customer review meetings

plugins.name: exchange-mailflow
plugins.description: Exchange Online mail flow diagnostics and deliverability — guided 'email not received' troubleshooting, transport rules, quarantine, connectors, and SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks with client-safe explanations

plugins.name: sharing-auditor
plugins.description: SharePoint and OneDrive external sharing auditor — find overshared links, anonymous access, stale guest users, and auto-generate approval tasks for safe revocation

plugins.name: teams-lifecycle
plugins.description: Teams lifecycle management — create and archive teams with templates, enforce naming and ownership, apply sensitivity labels, and run expiration reviews using non-technical 'project start/end' language

plugins.name: servicedesk-runbooks
plugins.description: M365 service desk auto-runbooks — guided workflows for common tickets like shared mailbox access, MFA reset, file recovery, and password reset with pre-checks, approval gates, and end-user verification

plugins.name: microsoft-bookings
plugins.description: Microsoft Bookings — manage appointment calendars, services, staff availability, and customer bookings via Graph API

plugins.name: microsoft-forms-surveys
plugins.description: Microsoft Forms — create surveys, add questions, collect responses, and summarize results via Graph API

plugins.name: microsoft-lists-tracker
plugins.description: Microsoft Lists — create and manage lists for process tracking, issue logs, and project trackers via Graph API

plugins.name: copilot-studio-bots
plugins.description: Copilot Studio — design bot topics, author trigger phrases, configure generative AI orchestration, and publish chatbots

plugins.name: onenote-knowledge-base
plugins.description: OneNote Knowledge Base - headless-first Graph automation for advanced page architecture, styling, and task workflows

plugins.name: microsoft-loop
plugins.description: Microsoft Loop workspaces, pages, and components — create collaborative spaces, embed portable Loop components across M365 apps, manage via Graph API, and govern Loop at the tenant level.

plugins.name: marketplace-dev-tools
plugins.description: Research Microsoft APIs, scaffold new plugins, extend existing ones, and audit marketplace coverage

plugins.name: power-pages
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Pages — sites, page templates, Liquid, web forms, table permissions, web roles, and Dataverse portal integration

plugins.name: teams-app-dev

plugins.name: azure-storage
plugins.description: Azure Storage — Blob, Queue, Table, and Files services with lifecycle policies, SAS tokens, and managed identity access
